name: Unlicensed forklift driver hit me at work, does that help claim?
description: Big yes—proves negligence, ups payout potential.

mainEntity.name: Unlicensed forklift driver hit me at work, does that help claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Big yes—proves negligence, ups payout potential.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, major negligence/OSHA violation strengthens case for higher comp/third-party.** $ settlements rose.[1] Key factors: Training records prove; punitive possible. Boosts value. Document fully.
